visual_description: A man in a dark jacket stands in a dark environment, holding a microphone and looking upwards. The scene cuts to a bright, overexposed shot of a vehicle's headlights at night. A man with graying hair in a light-colored suit is shown on a phone call, looking concerned. A man with a mustache is seen behind bars, looking off to the side. A man in a dark suit and tie is on a radio, looking intently at a wall covered in photos.
audio_description: A loud, sustained siren wails, followed by a series of heavy, rhythmic thuds, like a large object being struck repeatedly.
